list.name: coin
list.label: Coin
list.query: SELECT DISTINCT coin FROM trades ORDER BY 1
list.definition: SELECT DISTINCT coin FROM trades ORDER BY 1

options.content: **Everyone's executed orders** (public trade tape) above the `$min_notional` USD threshold, plus a **forced-exit proxy** (open-interest contractions that look like liquidation cascades). _Real stop-loss / take-profit orders are private and can't be shown; the forced-exit proxy is the closest signal of where stops actually fired._

targets.rawSql:
SELECT time AS "time",
       coin,
       CASE WHEN side='B' THEN 'BUY' ELSE 'SELL' END AS side,
       px,
       round(sz::numeric, 4) AS sz,
       round((px*sz)::numeric, 0) AS notional_usd
FROM trades
WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND coin IN (${coin:singlequote}) AND px*sz >= $min_notional
ORDER BY time DESC
LIMIT 200

panels.title: Large-trade net notional (buys − sells, per bucket)
panels.description: Signed notional of trades above the threshold. Green = aggressive whale buying, red = selling.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT time_bucket('$__interval'::interval, time) AS "time",
       coin AS metric,
       sum(CASE WHEN side='B' THEN px*sz ELSE -px*sz END) AS net_notional
FROM trades
WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND coin IN (${coin:singlequote}) AND px*sz >= $min_notional
GROUP BY 1, coin
ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Forced-exit proxy — signed liquidation pressure
panels.description: OI-contraction magnitude signed by price direction. Positive = short flush (OI down, price up), negative = long flush (OI down, price down). This is where stops/liquidations most likely fired.

targets.rawSql:
WITH b AS (
  SELECT time_bucket('$__interval'::interval, time) AS bucket, coin,
         last(open_interest, time) AS oi,
         last(mark_px, time) AS mark
  FROM assetctx
  WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND coin IN (${coin:singlequote})
  GROUP BY 1, coin
), d AS (
  SELECT bucket, coin,
         oi   - lag(oi)   OVER (PARTITION BY coin ORDER BY bucket) AS d_oi,
         mark - lag(mark) OVER (PARTITION BY coin ORDER BY bucket) AS d_mark
  FROM b
)
SELECT bucket AS "time",
       coin AS metric,
       CASE WHEN d_mark < 0 THEN -greatest(-d_oi, 0) ELSE greatest(-d_oi, 0) END AS liq_pressure
FROM d
WHERE d_oi IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY bucket

panels.title: Biggest forced-exit events (largest 1-min OI drops)
panels.description: Largest open-interest contractions paired with the bar's price move — candidate liquidation/stop cascades.

targets.rawSql:
WITH b AS (
  SELECT time_bucket('1 minute', time) AS bucket, coin,
         last(open_interest, time) AS oi,
         last(mark_px, time) AS mark
  FROM assetctx
  WHERE $__timeFilter(time) AND coin IN (${coin:singlequote})
  GROUP BY 1, coin
), d AS (
  SELECT bucket, coin,
         oi - lag(oi) OVER (PARTITION BY coin ORDER BY bucket) AS d_oi,
         (mark / nullif(lag(mark) OVER (PARTITION BY coin ORDER BY bucket), 0) - 1) * 10000 AS ret_bps
  FROM b
)
SELECT bucket AS "time",
       coin,
       round(d_oi::numeric, 2) AS oi_change,
       round(ret_bps::numeric, 1) AS price_move_bps,
       CASE WHEN ret_bps < 0 THEN 'long flush' ELSE 'short flush' END AS likely_side
FROM d
WHERE d_oi < 0
ORDER BY d_oi ASC
LIMIT 20
